subject: Double charge on corporate card ending 4412
summary: Customer reports duplicate charge of $2,450 on corporate Visa ending 4412 from vendor TechSupply Inc.

subject: Wire transfer status inquiry
summary: Customer inquired about the status of an international wire transfer to Singapore branch.

subject: Unauthorized transaction on debit card
summary: Customer reports an unauthorized $890 ATM withdrawal in a city they have not visited.

subject: Request to update mailing address
summary: Customer moved to a new apartment and needs mailing address updated for statements.

subject: Dispute on subscription charge
summary: Customer disputes a recurring $49.99 charge from StreamMax that was supposed to be cancelled.

subject: Account statement download issue
summary: Customer unable to download Q2 account statement in PDF format from the portal.

subject: Suspected fraud on institutional trading account
summary: Compliance officer reports suspicious after-hours trades totaling $1.2M on sub-account 44-TRD.

subject: API rate limit increase request
summary: Customer requests rate limit increase from 1000 to 5000 requests/min for market data API.

subject: Refund for failed international transfer
summary: Customer requests refund of $150 fee for an international transfer that failed due to incorrect SWIFT code.

subject: Mobile app login issues
summary: Customer unable to log in to mobile app after OS update. Biometric authentication not working.
